questions.question: What is the first action you must take to create a new page in Notion?

options.text: Click the **New page** button in the sidebar
options.explanation: The article states that you start by clicking the New page button.

options.text: Press the forward slash ( / ) key
options.explanation: Pressing '/' shows a list of blocks after a page already exists.

options.text: Select a template from the template gallery
options.explanation: Templates are optional; you still need to create a page first.

options.text: Upload an image to the workspace
options.explanation: Uploading an image does not create a page.

questions.question: Which keyboard shortcut displays a list of different content types you can add to a page?

options.text: Ctrl + N
options.explanation: Ctrl + N opens a new window, not a block menu.

options.text: The forward slash ( / ) key
options.explanation: The article explicitly says typing '/' shows the block menu.

options.text: Alt + T
options.explanation: Alt + T is not mentioned as a shortcut in the guide.

options.text: Shift + Enter
options.explanation: Shift + Enter creates a line break, not a block list.

questions.question: When you click **New page**, which of the following is NOT listed as a page type option in the article?

options.text: Table
options.explanation: Table is mentioned as one of the page type choices.

options.text: Board
options.explanation: Board is also listed as an option.

options.text: List
options.explanation: List appears in the article’s menu of page types.

options.text: Calendar
options.explanation: The guide does not include Calendar as a default page type; it only mentions table, board, list, or an empty page.

questions.question: How can you make a newly created page easier to identify later?

options.text: Add an icon to the page
options.explanation: The article says you can give a page an icon for easy identification.

options.text: Change the page background color
options.explanation: Background color isn’t mentioned as a way to identify a page.

options.text: Pin the page to the top of the sidebar
options.explanation: Pinning helps with access, but the guide highlights icons for identification.

options.text: Add a video to the page
options.explanation: Adding a video doesn’t affect how you spot the page later.

questions.question: Approximately how many templates are available in Notion’s template gallery?

options.explanation: The guide specifies a larger number.
The article mentions a higher count.
The text says “Browse over 10,000 templates in our template gallery.”
While Notion may have many, the article cites 10,000.

questions.question: If you want to add a to‑do list to a page, what is the recommended method?

options.text: Type the forward slash ( / ) and select the to‑do list block
options.explanation: The forward slash opens the block menu where you can pick a to‑do list.

options.text: Drag a to‑do list from the sidebar onto the page
options.explanation: The sidebar doesn’t contain ready‑made blocks.

options.text: Choose a to‑do list template from the template gallery
options.explanation: Templates are optional; the quick way is using the slash command.

options.text: Click the New page button again
options.explanation: Creating a new page does not add a to‑do list to an existing one.

questions.question: Which statement best describes an advantage of using a template when building a page?

options.text: Templates automatically sync changes across all of your pages.
options.explanation: Templates are starting points; they don’t create live sync relationships.

options.text: Templates provide pre‑built structures that save time and help maintain consistency.
options.explanation: The article promotes templates as a way to quickly start with a ready‑made layout, which is the key benefit.

options.text: Templates prevent you from adding any custom content later.
options.explanation: You can always edit a page after using a template.

options.text: Using a template makes the page load faster because it contains fewer blocks.
options.explanation: Load speed isn’t mentioned; the advantage is about convenience and consistency.
